title: Inscription For A Moss-House In The Shrubbery At Weston.
content:
Here, free from riot�s hated noise,
    Be mine, ye calmer, purer joys,
    A book or friend bestows;
    Far from the storms that shake the great,
    Contentment�s gale shall fan my seat,
    And sweeten my repose.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Cowper delivers a powerful performance in "Inscription For A Moss-House In The Shrubbery At Weston."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
